_meta.description: Per-model token pricing for cc-fleet-meter, in USD per 1,000,000 tokens.

sources.name: Anthropic Claude pricing (model overview)
sources.note: Base input/output per-MTok rates taken from the Anthropic model overview pricing table. Verified against the bundled claude-api reference (cache date 2026-06-04).

sources.name: Anthropic prompt caching pricing
sources.note: Cache economics: a 5-minute cache WRITE costs 1.25x the base input rate; a cache READ costs 0.1x the base input rate. cache_creation tokens are billed at the write rate, cache_read tokens at the read rate. (1-hour TTL writes cost 2x, not modeled here since Claude Code uses the default 5-minute TTL.)

cache_multipliers.note: These multipliers are applied to the model's base input rate to derive cache_creation and cache_read rates below. They are pre-computed into each model entry for transparency; override the whole file with --pricing <file> if rates change.

_meta.fallback_note: Models not listed fall back to the 'default' entry. Aliases without date suffixes match by prefix (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-8' matches 'claude-opus-4-8-20251101').
